So the easiest way for me to explain this is is if we pretend that unit 1, 2, 3 is available on the property website today, it's gonna fall under the available units bucket.
If tomorrow unit 1, 2, 3 is not on the property website, we're going to assume that somebody put in an application on it.
If after 7 days that unit does not reappear on the property website, meaning there wasn't a cancellation or denial.
We're going to move that unit from applications over to leases.
